description_long: This object consists of three weathered, industrial metal barrels, each with distinct coloration and heavy signs of rust and wear. The front barrel is a reddish-orange color with a prominent flammable warning symbol, indicating it may have contained hazardous materials. The middle barrel is yellow, also heavily dented and corroded, while the rear barrel is a greenish-blue with extensive rust patches and a more intact cylindrical form. All barrels are missing lids, exposing their open tops, and their surfaces are marred by scratches, dents, and peeling paint. The barrels are grouped closely together, suggesting they have been discarded or stored in an outdoor or industrial setting. Their battered appearance and warning label imply prior use for storage or transport of chemicals or fuel.
description: A group of three heavily rusted, dented metal barrels in red, yellow, and greenish-blue, with one displaying a flammable warning symbol.
description_view_0: Three barrels aligned front-to-back, with the red barrel and its flammable symbol most prominent.
description_view_1: Side view showing all three barrels' dented profiles and distinct colors: red, yellow, and greenish-blue.
description_view_2: Rear view with the greenish-blue barrel in front, showing its rusted surface and the tops of the other two barrels.
description_view_3: Side view from the opposite direction, highlighting the battered shapes and color differences of the barrels.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal hoops at top, middle, and bottom
attribute_labeling_or_markings: flammable warning symbol on red barrel
